SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.object.props.labels

Annotation Interface AIaFieldLabel

@Retention(RUNTIME) @Target({FIELD,METHOD,RECORD_COMPONENT}) public @interface AIaFieldLabel

Title: AIaFieldLabel

Description: Annotation for the custom field labeling used for the evaluation what label should be used for the field.

Copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Artur Linhart, Algites

Company: Algites

Date:
12.01.26 6:13

  • Element Details

    • label

      String label
      Hard label definition (single label purpose)
      Returns:
      hard labe definition
      Default:
      ""

    • labels

      AIaFieldLabel.Entry[] labels
      Mapping, according to purpose
      Returns:
      mapping, according to purpose
      Default:
      {}

    • labelResolver

      Class<? extends AIiFieldLabelResolver> labelResolver
      Resolver, used for the resolution of the labels. In the case with label resolver, the explicit labels assigned are ignored but are only resolved the value from the label resolver.
      Returns:
      label resolver used
      Default:
      eu.algites.lib.common.object.props.labels.AIaFieldLabel.NoLabelResolver.class

    • purpose

      AInRenderingOutputBuiltinPurpose purpose
      Default:
      DEFAULT

    • purposeCode

      String purposeCode
      Default:
      ""

    • purposeResolver

      Default:
      eu.algites.lib.common.object.props.labels.AIaFieldLabel.NoPurposeResolver.class

    • format

      AInRenderingOutputBuiltinFormat format
      Default:
      DEFAULT

      Default:
      ""

    • formatResolver

    • localeCode

      String localeCode
      Default:
      ""

    • localeResolver

      Class<? extends AIiRenderingOutputLocaleResolver> localeResolver
